## New Developer Start Here

> [!TIP]
> Recommended reading order for first-time onboarding (about 60-90 minutes).

| Step | Document | Why It Matters |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | `ARCHITECTURE` | Runtime topology, service dependencies, and critical data/event flows. |
| 2 | `API_REFERENCE` | Actual contract surface (/api/v1, /api/v2) with endpoint-level metadata. |
| 3 | `BACKEND_DESIGN` | Module responsibilities, risk hotspots, and read-order guidance. |
| 4 | `FOUNDRY_V1_TO_V2_MIGRATION` | Migration rules and compatibility decisions. |
| 5 | `ERROR_TAXONOMY` | Error contract expectations and failure classification. |
